languages.text: {n}Полковник оглаживает бороду и задумчиво кивает.{/n} "Это вы верно сказали... Стать сильнее — это хорошо, это понятно. Применять врага против него самого, как мы брали кости и куски растений на Заркове, тоже разумно".

{n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник оглаживает бороду и задумчиво кивает.{/n} "Это вы верно сказали... Стать сильнее — это хорошо, это понятно. Применять врага против него самого, как мы брали кости и куски растений на Заркове, тоже разумно".

traits.locale_text: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, that much is clear. Using the enemy's own strength against them — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

{n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

"You're right. The fear is of something stronger than you. But the strong do not fear the weak. The challenge of danger makes victory sweet, because it proves your own capabilities. The strong conquer and subjugate — that is how it was on Zarkov. Could it be the same with the Archenemy?"

{n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, that much is clear. Using the enemy's own strength against them — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

{n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

languages.text: 「あなたは正しい。恐れるのは自分より強いものだ。しかし、強者が弱者に対して恐怖を感じない時、危険に立ち向かうことは勝利を甘くする。それは自分の能力を証明するからだ。強者は征服し、支配する。それがザルコフの法則だ。敵もまた同じなのかもしれない。」
languages.original_text: "You're right. The fear is of something stronger than you. But the strong do not fear the weak. The challenge of danger makes victory sweet, because it proves your own capabilities. The strong conquer and subjugate — that is how it was on Zarkov. Could it be the same with the Archenemy?"

languages.text: {n}Albay, sakalını sıvazlıyor ve düşünceli bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "Bu konuda haklısınız... Güçlenmek iyi bir şeydir, bunu biliyoruz. Tıpkı Zarkov'da kemikleri ve bitki artıklarını kullandığımız gibi düşmanın kendi gücünü ona karşı kullanmak. Bu da mantıklı."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay, sakalını sıvazlıyor ve düşünceli bir şekilde başını sallıyor.{/n} "Bu konuda haklısınız... Güçlenmek iyi bir şeydir, bunu biliyoruz. Tıpkı Zarkov'da kemikleri ve bitki artıklarını kullandığımız gibi düşmanın kendi gücünü ona karşı kullanmak. Bu da mantıklı."

languages.text: {n}上校抚摸着胡须，若有所思地点了点头。{/n}“您说得对……变强总是好事，我们明白。用敌人的力量对付敌人——就像我们在扎尔科夫利用骨头和植物残渣那样——这话也有道理。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校抚摸着胡须，若有所思地点了点头。{/n}“您说得对……变强总是好事，我们明白。用敌人的力量对付敌人——就像我们在扎尔科夫利用骨头和植物残渣那样——这话也有道理。”

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel streicht sich durch seinen Bart und nickt nachdenklich.{/n} "Da habt Ihr recht ... Stärker zu werden, ist gut, das wissen wir. Die Stärke des Feindes gegen ihn einzusetzen ... so wie wir auf Zarkov Knochen und Pflanzenreste genutzt haben ... das macht Sinn."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel streicht sich durch seinen Bart und nickt nachdenklich.{/n} "Da habt Ihr recht ... Stärker zu werden, ist gut, das wissen wir. Die Stärke des Feindes gegen ihn einzusetzen ... so wie wir auf Zarkov Knochen und Pflanzenreste genutzt haben ... das macht Sinn."

languages.text: {n}Le colonel se frotte la barbe et acquiesce d'un air pensif.{/n} « Vous avez raison... Devenir plus forts est une bonne idée. Retourner la force de l'ennemi contre lui... Comme lorsque nous exploitions les os et les plantes de Zarkov... Je vois. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel se frotte la barbe et acquiesce d'un air pensif.{/n} « Vous avez raison... Devenir plus forts est une bonne idée. Retourner la force de l'ennemi contre lui... Comme lorsque nous exploitions les os et les plantes de Zarkov... Je vois. »

languages.text: {n}El coronel se mesa la barba y asiente, pensativo.{/n} «Tiene razón en eso... Hacerse más fuerte es bueno; lo sabemos. Usar la fuerza del enemigo en su contra, igual que usamos huesos y restos de plantas en Zarkov... también tiene sentido».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel strokes his beard and nods thoughtfully.{/n} "You're right about that... Becoming stronger is a good thing, we know. Using the enemy's own strength against it — the same way we used bones and scraps of plants back on Zarkov — that makes sense too."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel se mesa la barba y asiente, pensativo.{/n} «Tiene razón en eso... Hacerse más fuerte es bueno; lo sabemos. Usar la fuerza del enemigo en su contra, igual que usamos huesos y restos de plantas en Zarkov... también tiene sentido».
